source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: The Gold Coast Gem Show
events.description: Don\'t miss lots of gems, minerals, fossils, beads, jewelry, lapidary supplies, demonstrations, and kids activities at The Gold Coast Gem Show June 6 & 7 at the Ventura County Fairgrounds.... \n

events.title: 8th Annual Seaside Tattoo Show
events.description: Experience a three-day celebration of ink and culture at the 8th Annual Seaside Tattoo Show, featuring 100+ elite artists and 20+ nightly tattoo contests at the Ventura County Fairgrounds. From... \n

events.title: What is Art?
events.description: Free, community educational lecture/discussion. Everyone is welcome to join in and discover many souces of inspirations to create. Hellada Gallery believes that Art pushes our society, our economy, and our communities forward. “What is Art?” gatherings have been offered every week since June 2017.

events.title: Paranormal Cirque Voodoo
events.description: A crazy yet fun fusion between Circus, theatre, and cabaret in perfect harmony with the evolution of a show that brings you back to when we dream ... and when... \n

events.title: Secret Island Comedy Night
events.description: Welcome to Comedy Night at Secret Island Tiki Restaurant and Lounge! Get ready for a night full of laughter and good vibes with our talented lineup of comedians. Join us every Tuesday night at 8pm for a hilarious evening you won’t forget. Come enjoy some delicious food and drinks while you sit back and relax with friends. Our cozy venue provides the perfect

events.description: A co-creation safe space held weekly by Nicky da Kiid° of kid°MANDU. We begin by checking in with each other somatically, before working on our own projects. You are welcome to join Nicky in creating Art as Resistance by taking up space and embodying joy. Guidance on technique and art supplies provided by Nicky uoon request. events.title: June Gloom x Golden Poppy present: Gloomy Pride
events.description: That’s right, two of your favorite local music scene heroes, Golden Poppy Music and June Gloom Events are teaming up for a very queer show featuring some of LA’s best LQBTQ+ talent. Join us for live performances by Ryan Cassata , Abby Posner , The Sea Tease , Xtine and the Reckless Hearts , Nina Nepa , and Jules Penham . Tickets at: www.tickpick.com/organize

events.title: OPEN MIC NIGHT
events.description: Musicians & Poets! Come on down to the Grand Annex on the second Thursday of each month for Open Mic Night! To perform: Sign up at 6:30 PM. The first 12 sign-ups are guaranteed to perform, with additional artists as time allows. Plan to do 2 songs/poems (limit stage time to under 8 minutes). This is an all-ages show, all ages and genres are welcome to perfor

events.title: Tabla Marathon (Salar Nader Tabla Foundation)
events.description: The Salar Nader Tabla Foundation presents a day-long marathon in partnership with Rhea Designs, Inc. This full day of tabla drumming will showcase many talented performers and culminate in an unforgettable evening concert. Experience the artistry of our dedicated tabla players and engage with insightful “Tabla Talks” featuring next-generation artists sharing

events.title: Gloria Molina Grand Park's Summer Block Party
events.description: LA County's largest free Fourth of July celebration: a free block party with global beats, live arts, food trucks, the Grand Park Ferris Wheel, and a spectacular drone light show finale in the heart of downtown LA. All ages, pets welcome.
events.sourceName: Gloria Molina Grand Park's Summer Block Party (July 4)

events.title: Good Old Blues LIVE!
events.description: Live music performance by Robert Dean every 1st and 3rd Saturday of each month from 7:00PM to 9:00PM. No cover, donations are welcome. Some refreshments and snack will be available.

events.title: #Standing4BlackGirls Music and Poetry Festival
events.description: The #Standing4BlackGirls Music and Poetry concert festival will feature original multi-genre music and spoken word performances by Black female-identifying and queer artists.
